Document:
# Bots
Honkbots and Jonkbots are service robots that have gained sentience. They are harmless by design, though their presence in sensitive areas of the station may disrupt normal operations.
As a bot you are [bold]immune to biological hazards[/bold] such as toxins and suffocation, as you do not breathe. You do not eat or sleep, and you cannot be made into a revolutionary.
You have [bold]no objectives[/bold].
## Variants
- [bold]Honkbot[/bold]: a standard service bot with a built-in bike horn. Harmless but loud. - [bold]Jonkbot[/bold]: a Honkbot variant that produces broken cluwne horn sounds. [bold]Explodes[/bold] when destroyed.
